error_signature: The caller does not have permission
title: Permission denied when saving to Google Sheets
symptom: When attempting to save data to a Google Sheets node, n8n returns a 403 error with the message 'The caller does not have permission'.
applies_when: Google Drive API and Google Sheets API are enabled
not_this_if: Credentials are incorrect or not set up properly
root_cause: The error occurs when the credentials used for the Google Sheets node do not have the necessary permissions to write to the specified spreadsheet. This can happen if the spreadsheet has restrictions or if the credentials are not correctly configured.
fix_steps: Check the permissions of the Google Sheets file to ensure it allows writing.
Recreate the Google Sheets node in n8n.
Test the workflow again to see if the issue persists.
agent_instruction: Recreate the Google Sheets node and ensure the file permissions allow writing.
